text:
is a single by Yoko Takahashi.
The single was published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number KICM-1307, it was released on 28 April 2010. https://vgmdb.net/album/20679 
It is the theme of the Neon Genesis Evangelion ~Tamashi no Kiseki~ pachislot machine. The cover was illustrated by Shoichi Masuo. 

Tracklist

Staff

Track-01
Lyrics: Neko Oikawa
Composition: Hidetoshi Sato
Arrangement: Toshiyuki Ohmori
Vocal: Yoko Takahashi

Track-02
Lyrics: Yoko Takahashi
Composition: Charles François Gounod
Arrangement: Shirō Sagisu
Vocal: Yoko Takahashi, Catherine Bott Choir
